description: CompositionGrey and purple cap made of 100% polyester, has embroidery on the crown, nike swoosh embroidered on the curved visor and an adjustable velcro fastener at the backFitRegularWash careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryThis nike cap looks great and offers protection from the sun with its mesh panel stitch on the crown. The purple embroidery on the crown and visor contrasts well with the sober grey fabric. Team it with your casual or sporty clothes.
